sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_edges (origin UInt64, destination UInt64, edge UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY origin;
UPDATE h3_edges SET edge = h3GetUnidirectionalEdge(599686042433355775, 599686043507097600) WHERE origin = 599686042433355775;
SELECT edge FROM h3_edges WHERE origin = 599686042433355775 AND destination = 599686043507097599;
